commands.review_summary:
The branch removes the Gateway one-turn image-model override path for text-only WebChat image uploads, restores staged MediaPaths/media-understanding routing, and adds fallback-resolution regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the linked bug has concrete provider logs and current-main source shows WebChat text-only image uploads taking the one-turn modelOverride path. I did not run a live WebChat/provider reproduction in this read-only review.
